content.text:
*[blinks, looks slightly caught]*

I mean — I wasn't being dismissive, I was just... describing what happens. The warm attentive ones are fine, they're great people, it's just that the chemistry isn't there. That's not dismissiveness, that's just... how attraction works?

*[shifts slightly, recrosses legs]*

And anyway, that's kind of the whole thing, right? I need to rewire my attraction patterns or whatever. Figure out why I'm drawn to the unavailable ones. That's what I'm here to figure out.

*[small laugh]*

I've basically diagnosed myself with anxious attachment at this point, I've read all the books. I just can't seem to... apply it.
